# Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Locations Catalog

## UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC location catalog
Use this as the BOSS master catalog of SBDC centers in the UH Texas Gulf Coast SBDC Network.

## Angelina College SBDC - Lufkin
- Source: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Angelina_College_SBDC.asp
- Service area: Angelina, Polk, Houston, Nacogdoches, Trinity, and Tyler counties
- Address: 3500 South First Street, Lufkin, TX 75901
- Phone: 936-633-5394
- Email: damerine@angelina.edu
- Hours: Summer hours listed on page: Monday-Thursday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.
- BOSS note: Use for entrepreneurs in the Deep East Texas service area, not as the primary 77084 referral.

## Blinn College SBDC - Brenham
- Source: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Blinn_College_SBDC.asp
- Service area: Austin, Colorado, and Washington counties
- Address: 108 Blinn Blvd., Brenham, TX 77833
- Phone: 979-830-4137
- Email: sbdc@blinn.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.
- BOSS note: Use for entrepreneurs in Austin/Colorado/Washington counties.

## Fort Bend County SBDC - Richmond
- Source: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Fort_Bend_County_SBDC.asp

- Phone: 713-743-5550
- Email: sbdcfortbend@uh.edu
- Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 a.m.-5:00 p.m.
- BOSS note: Important proximity check for 77084/west Houston/Katy/Southwest Harris users. Verify with the official locator.

## Houston Center SBDC - Houston

- Email: sbdcmetro@uh.edu

## BOSS Library use notes
- Treat this as a resource-routing document, not as legal, tax, lending, certification, or procurement advice.
- Use the linked source URL as the user-facing official link.
- Ask discovery questions before routing when the user is early-stage or unclear.
- For Houston/77084 users, verify county/service-area fit through the official SBDC/SBA locator before giving a final local-office referral.
